title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity Science Skills is a workbench platform that orchestrates frontier AI models with integrated access to over 30 scientific databases like UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. The tool enables researchers to move from hypothesis to wet-lab experiment design in minutes by coordinating models, literature, and data through agentic workflows.
